reviews.review_description:
First off, it is short. However, if this is a glimpse into what you are able to create for a larger game, I’m in! 

You are only watching, not interacting. But this is a “gem” to your friends or parents. Spooked me out!

Love it!
I dont know what should I do completely. Just saw 3 doors and cannot open? Uninstalled within 5mins.

Love it had me scared  jumping and  and screaming I like the way you had it set up please add more doors more jumpscares locomotion and more doors please and more scary like one would like a monster or a demon or something creature coming at you can you turn off the guardian so you able to walk to the doors more love the graphics and the ending could be better

developer_response.body: We're glad you liked it! Thanks for your recommendations and review. New doors will be added. Look out for future updates!

reviews.review_description: Add locomotion/ rotation to the experiences and more doors. Thanks

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review and feedback! We do have a long-term plan to add more doors and we'll also consider adding locomotion. Look out for future updates!

reviews.review_description: It's a lot of fun it's so scary to play I like yhe deff doors in it is there going to be updated so we can walk through the doors

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the review!

reviews.review_description: It’s so fun Just Like Roblox DOORS. I Love It. 5 Stars Absolutely.
